summary: Hero Action Card Visual Refinement Testing - All 8 visual refinements verified on Stanford and Emory journey pages. Both pages render without errors. 95% of visual requirements pass, with one minor CSS specificity issue on CTA button padding.

issues: CTA button padding shows 12px/16px instead of expected 14px/24px (py-3.5 px-6). The .ds-btn-primary CSS class in pipeline-premium.css has 'padding: 12px 16px' which overrides Tailwind utility classes. Consider using !important or inline styles to enforce the desired padding.

action_items: MINOR: Fix CTA button padding override - .ds-btn-primary CSS class (padding: 12px 16px) overrides Tailwind py-3.5 px-6 classes. Either update the CSS class or use inline styles.
